title: poidium juergensii var. juergensii
intro: Poidium juergensii var. juergensii is a variety of the Poidium juergensii plant, also known as Cape Teatree or Cape Plumbago, which is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Poidium juergensii var. juergensii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against infections. Herbal preparations of Poidium juergensii var. juergensii include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
